loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing cumulative energy (kWh/kVArh) for this month across panel members; SEC (kWh/t) is not measured by this asset.

loop1.title: Energy Consumption Trend
loop1.note: Showing total active and reactive energy for the panel; per-member breakdowns (UPS, BPDP, HHF) are rendered from member meters, but some supply feeders (Solar, Transformer) have no data.

loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing apparent power (kVA) and reactive power (kVAr) — rated capacity is unknown for this asset, so load percentage and peak markers are omitted.

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: Showing Worst Peak kW and UPS/BPDB demand trends — Load Factor and Critical Demand Threshold are omitted because this asset's nameplate rating is unknown.
